title: tagetes parryi
intro: Tagetes parryi, also known as Mexican marigold or Mexican tournesol, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and the southwestern United States, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Tagetes parryi include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Tagetes parryi can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or topical cream, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms of herbal preparations.
